headline: IPCMC bill stalled for 6th consecutive year
context: The Independent Police Complaints and Misconduct Commission bill, first proposed in 2019, remains unlegislated as of March 2025.

cards.big: IPCMC proposed in 2005, bill drafted in 2019, still not enacted by 2025
cards.sub: 20 years of promises for independent police oversight remain unfulfilled

cards.big: Royal Commission recommended IPCMC in 2005 with 125 reform proposals
cards.sub: IPCC Act 2022 passed instead, lacking key investigative and enforcement powers

cards.big: Suhakam documented 53 custodial death complaints between 2020 and 2025
cards.sub: Without independent oversight, accountability for deaths in custody remains weak

cards.big: 62% of Malaysians support independent police oversight per Merdeka Center 2024 poll
cards.sub: Public trust in police complaint mechanisms remains below 40%

cards.big: A watchdog without teeth is not oversight, it is performance
IPCC received 1,847 complaints in 2024 but completed only 312 investigations
